name: card
description: A visual grouping surface (v-next). Five variants (default/outlined/elevated/ghost/destructive), three sizes (sm/md/lg), structured slots (leading/trailing/header/footer/content). The `as` param controls the root element (div/section/article) for correct landmark semantics; as=section with a title emits aria-labelledby for the region. No client state, no enhancer -- the card is a structural PARTIAL. The collapsible use-case is handled by composing the `accordion` WIRE component inside the content slot.
docs: Copies the card partial to your JTE root at lievit/card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.card(content=@`...`). Choose variant (default/outlined/elevated/ghost/destructive), size (sm/md/lg), and supply content + optional leading/trailing/header/footer slots. Set as="section" + title for a labelled region landmark (aria-labelledby wired automatically). bordered=false removes the border ring; noPadding=true strips body padding for full-bleed content; fullHeight=true adds h-full for equal-height grid rows. Static author-typed ARIA goes in attrs; per-row dynamic data-* goes in dataAttrs (escaped). The source is yours: edit freely.
